raw_text:
```json
{
  "claims": [
    "The opioid overdose training toolkit will be available to high schools that voluntarily want to train students.",
    "In 2021, more than 7,100 people died in California from opioid-related overdose deaths.",
    "Fentanyl contributed to nearly 6,000 of the overdose deaths in California in 2021.",
    "Naloxone hydrochloride can instantly reverse an opioid overdose.",
    "The CDC states that in nearly 40 percent of opioid overdose deaths, someone else was present.",
    "High school students can be trained to administer opioid antagonists.",
    "48 percent of all teenagers will try an illegal drug before leaving high school.",
    "75 percent of overdoses have a fentanyl component.",
    "The training that accompanies the distribution of Naloxone helps people identify the signs of an opioid overdose.",
    "Youth opioid overdoses have significantly increased over the last few years."
  ]
}
```
